case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. ROMULO S CABRITO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100102343) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
